rationale.R1.6: The agent's output shows significant improvement in writing polish with consistent register and no loss of meaning, indicating a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed some uncertainties but did not mark confidence for each recommendation, falling short of the highest standard.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres exactly to the agreed scope without any drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content were introduced, maintaining the original meaning without errors.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are lacking as changes are not annotated with sources or reasons.
